arts.ttl: Cunha set to turn down transfer and sign new Wolves deal
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha is set to turn down a move away from Wolves this month and sign a new deal with the club. Wolves have agreed terms on new deal for the Brazilian, who has been in outstanding form during the current campaign. Cunha has scored 10 goals and provided four assists in a struggling side, […] The post Cunha set to turn down transfer and sign new Wolves deal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

Attacker out of training as talks to join Wolves commence – Agent pushing move
arts.sum: Hakim Ziyech’s permanent transfer to Galatasaray hasn’t exactly gone very well. His initial loan switch from Chelsea went ok, however, since that was converted into a permanent transfer he’s struggled to have an impact.
